name: Chase Bank
description_short: Charlotte, NC: Chase Bank at 3319 Pineville-Matthews Rd provides personal and business banking Monday-Saturday.
description_long:
Located at 3319 Pineville-Matthews Rd in Charlotte, this standalone Chase Bank branch serves the Pineville-Matthews area with full-service banking. The branch operates Monday through Friday 9AM-5PM and Saturday 9AM-1PM, providing convenient access for area residents and businesses near this Charlotte location.

This Chase Bank branch offers personal checking and savings accounts, business banking, loan services, credit cards, and investment products. Customers can reach the branch directly at +1 980-287-4960 to discuss account options or get answers to banking questions specific to your Charlotte needs.

For a Charlotte, NC resident, visit during business hours with a valid ID to open accounts, deposit checks, or speak with a loan officer. Planning ahead for Saturdays is wise since the branch closes at 1PM—weekday mornings are typically less crowded.
pros: 24-hour ATM access with both drive-up and vestibule options for convenient after-hours cash withdrawals
ATMs support 14 languages including English, Spanish, Chinese, French, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese, Russian, Greek, Tagalog, and Vietnamese
Comprehensive accessibility features on ATMs including audio assistance, Braille, volume control, and screen contrast adjustment
Full-service branch offering checking, savings, credit cards, home loans, business banking, and wealth management in one location
Ability to schedule in-person meetings with relationship managers for personalized financial planning
ATMs dispense multiple denominations ($1s, $5s, $20s, $100s) and support card insert, card tap, and mobile wallet authentication
Multiple nearby branch locations within 4 miles for additional service options
cons: Limited branch hours (9 AM-5 PM weekdays only; closed weekends) restricts in-person service access despite 24-hour ATM availability
Deposit and bill pay services through ATMs restricted exclusively to JPMorganChase debit card holders, limiting ATM functionality for other account types
As a large national bank, likely does not offer competitive interest rates on savings or checking compared to online banks or credit unions
No mention of fee structures, minimum balance requirements, or specific interest rates on products
Generic branch location with limited community-specific offerings or specialized local services
best_for: Sarasota residents and business owners seeking full-service banking with multiple products under one roof
Customers who prioritize nationwide ATM and branch network access and convenience
Small business owners needing integrated banking and payment solutions through Chase for Business
Affluent clients interested in wealth management and investment services through J.P. Morgan
diagnosis: This branch is best for Sarasota-area customers who value the convenience and breadth of a major national bank offering comprehensive financial services from checking to wealth management. The main caveat is that weekday-only branch hours (9 AM-5 PM) and restricted ATM services for non-debit cardholders may limit accessibility for some customers, though 24-hour ATM availability partially mitigates this concern.
services: Credit cards with rewards and balance transfer options
Investment and brokerage services through J.P. Morgan
Chase for Business banking and merchant payment acceptance
Chase Private Client priority service and relationship banking
Home Lending consultation and equity services
24-hour ATM access with cash withdrawal and deposit
Check deposit and statement inquiry through ATM
meta_description: Charlotte, NC: Chase Bank at 3319 Pineville-Matthews Rd. Full-service banking with convenient weekday and Saturday hours.
